body_preview: Objective: Move the `build_graph_hotspots_report` and `build_graph_hotspots_payload` functions (plus any private helpers they depend on) from `src/commands_state.rs` (23,736-line monolith) to `src/commands_state_graph.rs` (1168 lines, already contains `handle_graph_subcommand`). This is the first step in splitting the monolith — one self-contained function g
title: Extract graph hotspots functions from commands_state.rs to commands_state_graph.rs
